name: ci-workflow-optimization-phase5
description: CI/CD speedup techniques: path filters on PR triggers, deduplicating pre-commit hooks (mypy/bandit), inlining serial jobs into compilation steps, timing data collection, and artifact retention reduction. Use when: (1) CI runs on doc-only PRs that should be skipped, (2) pre-commit duplicates type-check or SAST jobs, (3) a single-command job creates serial runner-provisioning overhead, (4) need per-test timing data to identify slow tests for nightly migration.
